segments.text: Oh, the turnaround grab's reach is insane!
segments.original_text: おっと振り向きつかみが長い長い
そのまま外に追い出して

segments.text: Can they punish the ledge getup?
segments.original_text: 崖上がりをとがめられるか

segments.text: Up tilt—with a deep dodge they're back in!
segments.original_text: 上強はなるほど深めの回避で戻ってくると

full_text: Ledge trap situation Oh, the turnaround grab's reach is insane! Pushing them off stage Forcing them to the ledge Can they punish the ledge getup? Up tilt—with a deep dodge they're back in!
